name: Ayfie International
longBusinessSummary: Ayfie International AS, a search company, provides software products. The company develops site search and knowledge discovery solutions in Norway. Its products include AppSearch, a plug and play service that eliminates the need for coding and manual processes for developers and application users. The company offers text analytics and search technology; support and maintenance services; and professional and consultancy services. Its platform includes technologies from the fields of insight engines and generative AI. The company was formerly known as ayfie Group AS and changed its name to Ayfie International AS in June 2024. Ayfie International AS is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
